problem.label: The Real Problem
problem.headline: It's not an expertise problem — it's a system problem
problem.subtext: Most service business owners face these challenges every day
problem.card1Text: A great month followed by nothing. You can't plan or grow without predictability.
problem.card2Text: Referrals are great, but they're not a strategy. You can't control or scale them.
problem.card3Text: Good ads start with a clear message. Without clarity, your budget gets wasted.

services.label: What We Offer
services.headline: Six services — one complete system
services.subtext: Each service is designed to work with the others — from research to ads to conversion
services.s1Text: Deep analysis of your market, competitors, and audience before any campaign launches.
services.s2Text: A complete journey designed from first touch to purchase decision.
services.s3Text: Define your competitive positioning and the brand message that sets you apart.
services.s4Text: Ad copy and static creatives designed to stop the scroll and drive clicks.
services.s5Text: Pages built to convert interested visitors into qualified leads ready to contact you.
services.s6Text: Meta campaigns built on real data and precise targeting of your ideal client.
services.reportNote: Every 7 days we send you a detailed report about the performance.

howItWorks.headline: 4 steps from zero to client
howItWorks.subtext: A proven system that works repeatedly across multiple industries
howItWorks.step1Text: Deep analysis of your market, competitors, and audience before any campaign launches
howItWorks.step2Text: Precise targeting of your ideal customer on Meta platforms
howItWorks.step3Text: Converting interest into a real intent to contact you
howItWorks.step4Text: A filtering process that separates serious leads from browsers

about.label: About Us
about.headline: We specialize in one thing — and we master it
about.name: ZM Acquisition
about.text1: We specialize in building client acquisition systems for service-based businesses. We don't believe in random ads — we believe in engineered systems that produce measurable and repeatable results.
about.text2: We've worked with diverse sectors: Pilates studios, accounting firms, training centers, and fitness gyms — and in every case, the result is the same: clients ready to buy.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.headline: Clear Answers
faq.subtext: Questions most of our clients ask before starting
faq.q1: What's the difference between you and a regular ad agency?
faq.a1: We don't just sell ads — we build a complete system: ads, landing pages, filtering, and follow-up. The goal isn't clicks, but actual clients.
faq.q2: How long does the setup take?
faq.a2: Usually 7 to 14 days to launch the first campaign. After that, we continuously optimize based on real data.
faq.q3: Do you work with all industries?
faq.a3: We specialize in service businesses: gyms, training centers, accountants, coaches, and studios. If you sell a service, we can help you.
faq.q4: What is the required advertising budget?
faq.a4: We work with budgets starting as low as $200/month. What matters isn't the size, but the right targeting and the right system.

contact.subtext: Book your free strategy session — 30 minutes where we analyze your situation and propose the next step
contact.benefit2: Comprehensive analysis of your current situation
contact.benefit3: Clear action plan for the next step
contact.benefit5: Available in Arabic, French, and English
contact.formSub: Fill out the form below and we will contact you in less than 24 hours.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.disclaimer: By clicking the button, you agree to the processing of your data according to our privacy policy.

reviews.label: Client Reviews
reviews.headline: What our clients say
reviews.r1Text: The system ZM Acquisition built for us transformed how we get clients. We no longer rely on luck or referrals; we have a predictable flow of qualified leads every month.
reviews.r2Text: Professional and result-driven. The ROI we've seen since launching our campaign has been incredible. Best marketing investment we've ever made.
reviews.r3Text: I was skeptical at first, but the results speak for themselves. The landing page and funnel strategy are top-notch. Highly recommended for any service business.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At ZM Acquisition, we take your privacy seriously. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you use our website and services.
privacyPage.section1Text: We collect information you provide directly to us, such as when you fill out a contact form, book a consultation, or connect with our services. This may include your name, email address, phone number, and business details.
privacyPage.section2Text: We use the information we collect to provide, maintain, and improve our services, communicate with you, analyze how our services are used, and to comply with legal obligations.
privacyPage.section3Text: We implement appropriate technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.
privacyPage.section4Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us.
